title: Meeting & Stakeholder Scripts

meeting_crm_linker.py: Added db_paths import for unified database access
Added create_person_in_db() for creating DB entries
Added record_meeting_interaction() to record interactions in DB
Updated ensure_crm_profile() to return (slug, person_id) tuple
Updated process_meeting() to store person_id in links and record interactions
Output JSON now includes both crm_slug and person_id fields
meeting_crm_sync.py: Added db_paths import for unified database access
Added find_person_by_name() and find_person_with_deals() for DB lookups
Added create_interaction() to record meeting interactions in DB
sync_meeting_to_crm() now creates interaction records in n5_core.db
Results include db_interactions list with person_id and interaction_id
Summary now reports DB interactions count
stakeholder_intel.py: Added db_paths import for unified database access
Added get_person_deals() to include deal involvement
Added get_person_interactions() for recent DB interactions
Added --db-id argument for direct database ID lookup
Added find_people_for_meeting_db() for DB-based meeting lookup
summarize_intel() now shows deal involvement and DB interactions
Intelligence report now has dedicated sections for DB data
auto_create_stakeholder_profiles.py: Replaced profiles.db with n5_core.db via db_paths
Added find_person_by_email() and find_person_by_name() for DB lookups
Added create_person_in_db() for unified database entries
Added create_interaction() to record initial meeting interactions
create_markdown_profile() creates files in CRM_INDIVIDUALS path
process_meeting_attendees() creates both DB and markdown entries
Links people.markdown_path to the created file

verification_results.db_queries: DB queries verified - 259 people in database, functions return expected results

notes_for_orchestrator: All 4 scripts now use unified n5_core.db via db_paths imports
Existing markdown profile workflow preserved - DB adds extra tracking layer
stakeholder_intel now includes deal involvement section (key new feature)
meeting_crm_linker output format changed: crm_person_id renamed to crm_slug, added person_id
W1.1 and W1.2 dependencies (db_paths, schema) worked as expected
